title: Make Product Info Editable
why: User wanted to manually add or edit product fields like Color, Size, and Price directly from the UI without breaking the system
solution: Added PUT /api/inventory/product-info endpoint that safely updates both ImportBatch and ProductRoll models using a transaction based on the supplier/subSku composite key. Updated StockDetailModal to toggle an edit state.
prevention: Always ensure composite keys (supplier + subSku) remain read-only when updating bulk records to prevent data fragmentation
